business.name: Bill’s Junk removal
business.tagline: Clear it out, haul it away

hero.headline: Hot tubs, sheds, *chicken coops* — we haul it all
hero.subheadline: Lancaster's cleanup crew. One call and it's gone.

services_section.label: THE HAUL
services_section.heading: What needs to go?
services_section.subheading: From furniture to yard debris, we load it and lose it

services.title: Furniture Removal
services.description: Heavy couches, old beds, broken dressers. We muscle it out so you don't have to.

services.title: Appliance Pickup
services.description: Refrigerators, washers, hot water heaters. We handle the heavy lifting and proper disposal.

services.title: Shed & Structure Removal
services.description: Old sheds, hot tub enclosures, chicken coops. We tear down and haul away.

services.title: Yard Debris Cleanup
services.description: Brush, branches, landscaping leftovers. We clear your property clean.

about.heading: Bill's crew gets it done
about.body: We're the Lancaster team that shows up when we say we will. Careful with your property, fair with our pricing.

reviews.name: Greg H.
reviews.text: Bill made removing our bushes and shrubs look easy. Prompt, professional, and careful with his machinery on our property.

reviews.name: Jessica G.
reviews.text: Extremely responsive removing our shed, hot tub, and enclosure. Professional and timely. Would definitely use again.

reviews.name: Maggie S.
reviews.text: Had heavy furniture we couldn't move ourselves. They got everything out fast, were super nice, and the price was very reasonable.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where we haul
service_areas.subheading: Serving Lancaster County and surrounding areas

cta.heading: Ready to clear it out?
cta.body: Free quotes, fair prices, and we show up when promised. Let's get that junk out of your way.
